breaking.title: Five dead after under-construction warehouse collapses at Taratala in Kolkata
breaking.summary: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari said that the building plan of warehouse was faulty and ordered a halt on all construction activities under Kolkata Municipal Corporation area till July 31.

breaking.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
breaking.summary: Experts say Trump is likely to ignore it, but that even though it carries little power, it is politically significant.

breaking.title: Watch: Will the sacrilege controversy cost AAP’s Bhagwant Mann his CM seat? | Above the Fold | 24.06.2026
breaking.summary: In today’s episode: the row over Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann’s alleged sacrilege video, Kolkata warehouse roof collapse that left at least three people dead, criticism over Maharashtra’s RTI rules amendments, findings from a UN inquiry report on Gaza, and more.

breaking.title: Iran invites Modi for official burial ceremonies of Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei
breaking.summary: MEA officials did not clarify whether PM will travel for the funeral which will be held between July 3 and 9; Iran’s Petroleum Minister arrives in New Delhi to discuss investment opportunities

breaking.title: Zohran Mamdani-backed candidates excel in congressional primaries
breaking.summary: Zohran Mamdani’s slate of candidates with ties to the Democratic Socialists of America swept out area ​incumbent Democrats in a stunning win for the 34-year-old mayor

breaking.title: Quote of the day by David Abrams: "There are good assets and bad assets but good prices and bad prices supersede whether the assets are good or bad"
breaking.summary: David Abrams stresses that investment outcomes depend more on entry price than asset quality. Even strong businesses can underperform if overvalued, while weaker ones can generate returns if bought cheaply. The insight reinforces core value investing principles of margin of safety, disciplined valuation, and avoiding momentum-driven buying.

breaking.title: Watch: International Maritime Organisation to evacuate thousands of stranded seafarers in Persian Gulf
breaking.summary: The International Maritime Organisation, or IMO, has announced plans to evacuate thousands of seafarers stranded in the Persian Gulf, as authorities work to restore shipping activity following the U.S.-Iran peace agreement and the reopening of regional sea lanes.

breaking.title: Analysis: Why Same Areas In Mumbai Get Submerged Every Monsoon
breaking.summary: For many Mumbai residents, the city's flood map has become remarkably predictable. (File photo)
